# policies.py
def is_active_admin(user):
    # Correct: centralize the policy logic so it can be updated in one place
    return user.role == "admin" and user.is_active

# auth.py
def login(user):
    if is_active_admin(user):
        setup_admin_session()

# ui.py
def render_dashboard(user):
    if is_active_admin(user):
        show_admin_panel()
